theorem `everyone_has_an_admirer_so_someone_admires_everyone` failed: cases with `| intro a b` expects an existential or conjunction proof

root_declarations.statement: A subset B -> B subset C -> A subset C

root_declarations.name: pipeline_for_alice
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : Person, Student(x) -> Enrolled(x)) -> (forall x : Person, Enrolled(x) -> Graduated(x)) -> Student(alice) -> Graduated(alice)

root_declarations.name: pipeline_exists
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : Person, Student(x) -> Enrolled(x)) -> (forall x : Person, Enrolled(x) -> Graduated(x)) -> (exists x : Person, Student(x)) -> exists x : Person, Graduated(x)

root_declarations.name: package_two_certificates
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : Person, Student(x) -> Enrolled(x)) -> (forall x : Person, Student(x) -> Graduated(x)) -> forall x : Person, Student(x) -> Enrolled(x) /\ Graduated(x)

root_declarations.name: set_ext
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : T, (x in A -> x in B) /\ (x in B -> x in A)) -> A = B

root_declarations.name: union_subset
root_declarations.statement: A subset C -> B subset C -> union(A, B) subset C

root_declarations.name: eq_trans
root_declarations.statement: x = y -> y = z -> x = z

root_declarations.name: congr_pred2_left
root_declarations.statement: x = y -> R(x, z) -> R(y, z)

root_declarations.name: congr_pred2_right
root_declarations.statement: y = z -> R(x, y) -> R(x, z)

root_declarations.name: forall_and_left
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : A, P(x) /\ Q(x)) -> forall x : A, P(x)

root_declarations.name: forall_and_right
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : A, P(x) /\ Q(x)) -> forall x : A, Q(x)

root_declarations.name: forall_and_intro
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : A, P(x)) -> (forall x : A, Q(x)) -> forall x : A, P(x) /\ Q(x)

root_declarations.name: forall_mono
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : A, P(x) -> Q(x)) -> (forall x : A, P(x)) -> forall x : A, Q(x)

root_declarations.name: exists_and_left
root_declarations.statement: (exists x : A, P(x) /\ Q(x)) -> exists x : A, P(x)

root_declarations.name: exists_and_right
root_declarations.statement: (exists x : A, P(x) /\ Q(x)) -> exists x : A, Q(x)

root_declarations.name: exists_or_left
root_declarations.statement: (exists x : A, P(x)) -> exists x : A, P(x) \/ Q(x)

root_declarations.name: exists_or_right
root_declarations.statement: (exists x : A, Q(x)) -> exists x : A, P(x) \/ Q(x)

root_declarations.name: exists_mono
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : A, P(x) -> Q(x)) -> (exists x : A, P(x)) -> exists x : A, Q(x)

root_declarations.name: not_exists_to_forall_not
root_declarations.statement: (not (exists x : A, P(x))) -> forall x : A, not P(x)

root_declarations.name: forall_not_to_not_exists
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : A, not P(x)) -> not (exists x : A, P(x))

root_declarations.name: forall_apply
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : A, P(x) -> Q(x)) -> P(a) -> Q(a)

root_declarations.name: id_injective
root_declarations.statement: Injective(fun x y : A => x = y)

root_declarations.name: id_surjective
root_declarations.statement: Surjective(fun x y : A => x = y)

root_declarations.name: id_bijective
root_declarations.statement: Bijective(fun x y : A => x = y)

root_declarations.name: compose_injective
root_declarations.statement: Injective(F) -> Injective(G) -> forall x1 : A, forall x2 : A, forall z : C, (exists y : B, F(x1, y) /\ G(y, z)) -> (exists y : B, F(x2, y) /\ G(y, z)) -> x1 = x2

root_declarations.name: compose_surjective
root_declarations.statement: Surjective(F) -> Surjective(G) -> forall z : C, exists x : A, exists y : B, F(x, y) /\ G(y, z)

root_declarations.name: append_cons
root_declarations.statement: append(cons(h, t), l) = cons(h, append(t, l))

root_declarations.name: append_assoc
root_declarations.statement: append(append(l1, l2), l3) = append(l1, append(l2, l3))

root_declarations.name: add_left_comm
root_declarations.statement: add(a, add(b, c)) = add(b, add(a, c))

root_declarations.name: add_middle_swap
root_declarations.statement: add(add(a, b), add(c, d)) = add(add(a, c), add(b, d))

root_declarations.name: add_cancel_left
root_declarations.statement: add(k, a) = add(k, b) -> a = b

root_declarations.name: mul_add_left
root_declarations.statement: mul(add(a, b), c) = add(mul(a, c), mul(b, c))

root_declarations.name: mul_add_right
root_declarations.statement: mul(a, add(b, c)) = add(mul(a, b), mul(a, c))

root_declarations.name: mul_assoc
root_declarations.statement: mul(mul(n, m), k) = mul(n, mul(m, k))

root_declarations.name: divides_trans
root_declarations.statement: Divides(a, b) -> Divides(b, c) -> Divides(a, c)

root_declarations.name: divides_add
root_declarations.statement: Divides(d, a) -> Divides(d, b) -> Divides(d, add(a, b))

root_declarations.name: modeq_sym
root_declarations.statement: ModEq(m, x, y) -> ModEq(m, y, x)

root_declarations.name: modeq_trans
root_declarations.statement: ModEq(m, x, y) -> ModEq(m, y, z) -> ModEq(m, x, z)

root_declarations.name: modeq_add
root_declarations.statement: ModEq(m, x, y) -> ModEq(m, u, v) -> ModEq(m, add(x, u), add(y, v))

root_declarations.name: modeq_scale
root_declarations.statement: ModEq(m, x, y) -> ModEq(m, mul(k, x), mul(k, y))

root_declarations.name: modeq_scale_right
root_declarations.statement: ModEq(m, x, y) -> ModEq(m, mul(x, k), mul(y, k))

root_declarations.name: modeq_mul
root_declarations.statement: ModEq(m, x, y) -> ModEq(m, u, v) -> ModEq(m, mul(x, u), mul(y, v))

root_declarations.name: add_assoc
root_declarations.statement: add(add(n, m), k) = add(n, add(m, k))

root_declarations.name: le_succ_inv
root_declarations.statement: forall k : Nat, le(m, succ(k)) -> le(m, k) \/ m = succ(k)

root_declarations.name: strong_induction_bounded
root_declarations.statement: P(0) -> (forall k : Nat, (forall m : Nat, le(m, k) -> P(m)) -> P(succ(k))) -> forall m : Nat, le(m, n) -> P(m)

root_declarations.name: strong_induction
root_declarations.statement: P(0) -> (forall k : Nat, (forall m : Nat, le(m, k) -> P(m)) -> P(succ(k))) -> P(n)

root_declarations.name: le_trans
root_declarations.statement: forall b : Nat, forall c : Nat, le(a, b) -> le(b, c) -> le(a, c)

root_declarations.name: set_ext
root_declarations.statement: (forall x : T, (x in A -> x in B) /\ (x in B -> x in A)) -> A = B

root_declarations.name: subset_trans
root_declarations.statement: A subset B -> B subset C -> A subset C

root_declarations.name: powerset_intro
root_declarations.statement: B subset A -> B in powerset(A)

root_declarations.name: powerset_elim
root_declarations.statement: B in powerset(A) -> B subset A

root_declarations.name: powerset_mono
root_declarations.statement: A subset B -> powerset(A) subset powerset(B)

root_declarations.name: subset_antisymm
root_declarations.statement: A subset B -> B subset A -> A = B

root_declarations.name: union_subset
root_declarations.statement: A subset C -> B subset C -> union(A, B) subset C

root_declarations.name: prod_member_intro
root_declarations.statement: x in A -> y in B -> pair(x, y) in prod(A, B)

root_declarations.name: prod_member_left
root_declarations.statement: pair(x, y) in prod(A, B) -> x in A

root_declarations.name: prod_member_right
root_declarations.statement: pair(x, y) in prod(A, B) -> y in B

root_declarations.name: prod_mono
root_declarations.statement: A subset C -> B subset D -> prod(A, B) subset prod(C, D)

root_declarations.name: compl_intro
root_declarations.statement: (not x in A) -> x in compl(A)

root_declarations.name: compl_elim
root_declarations.statement: x in compl(A) -> not x in A

root_declarations.name: union_assoc_left
root_declarations.statement: union(union(A, B), C) = union(A, union(B, C))

root_declarations.name: inter_assoc_left
root_declarations.statement: inter(inter(A, B), C) = inter(A, inter(B, C))
